fields.name: Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the entry, as assigned from the specified number series when the entry was created.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies the description of the incoming document. You must enter the description manually.

fields.name: Created Date-Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies when the incoming document line was created.

fields.name: Created By User Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the user who created the incoming document line.

fields.name: Released
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the incoming document has been approved.

fields.name: Released Date-Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies when the incoming document was approved.

fields.name: Released By User Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the user who approved the incoming document.

fields.name: Last Date-Time Modified
fields.tooltip: Specifies when the incoming document line was last modified.

fields.name: Last Modified By User Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the user who last modified the incoming document line.

fields.name: Posted
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the document or journal line that was created for this incoming document has been posted.

fields.name: Posted Date-Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies when the related document or journal line was posted.

fields.name: Document Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of document or journal that the incoming document can be connected to.

fields.name: Document No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the related document or journal line that is created for the incoming document.

fields.name: Posting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies when the document or journal line that relates to the incoming document was posted.

fields.name: Status
fields.tooltip: Specifies the status of the incoming document record.

fields.name: Vendor Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the vendor on the incoming document. The field may be filled automatically.

fields.name: Vendor VAT Registration No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the VAT registration number of the vendor, if the document contains that number. The field may be filled automatically.

fields.name: Vendor IBAN
fields.tooltip: Specifies the IBAN of the vendor on the incoming document.

fields.name: Document Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date that is printed on the incoming document. This is the date when the vendor created the invoice, for example. The field may be filled automatically.

fields.name: Vendor Bank Branch No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the bank branch number of the vendor on the incoming document.

fields.name: Vendor Bank Account No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the new value that you want the OCR service to produce for this field going forward.

fields.name: Vendor No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the vendor on the incoming document. The field may be filled automatically.

fields.name: Data Exchange Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the data exchange type that is used to process the incoming document when it is an electronic document.

fields.name: OCR Status
fields.tooltip: Specifies the status of the incoming document record when it takes part in the OCR process.

fields.name: OCR Track ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the process stage of the track ID in relation to the OCR service.

fields.name: OCR Service Doc. Template Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the document template that you want the OCR service provider to use when they convert the incoming-document file to an electronic document. Chose the field to pick a supported document template from the OCR Service Setup window.

fields.name: OCR Service Doc. Template Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the document template that you want the OCR service provider to use when they convert the incoming-document file to an electronic document. Chose the field to pick a supported document template from the OCR Service Setup window.

fields.name: Currency Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the currency code, if the document contains that code. The field may be filled automatically.

fields.name: Amount Excl. VAT
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount excluding VAT for the whole document. The field may be filled automatically.

fields.name: Amount Incl. VAT
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount including VAT for the whole document. The field may be filled automatically.

fields.name: VAT Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount of VAT that is included in the total amount.

fields.name: Due Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the vendor document must be paid. The field may be filled automatically.

fields.name: Vendor Invoice No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the document number of the original document you received from the vendor. You can require the document number for posting, or let it be optional. By default, it's required, so that this document references the original. Making document numbers optional removes a step from the posting process. For example, if you attach the original invoice as a PDF, you might not need to enter the document number. To specify whether document numbers are required, in the Purchases & Payables Setup window, select or clear the Ext. Doc. No. Mandatory field.

fields.name: Order No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the order number, if the document contains that number. The field may be filled automatically.

fields.name: Vendor Phone No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the new value that you want the OCR service to produce for this field going forward.

fields.name: URL
fields.tooltip: Specifies a link to the attached file.

fields.name: Job Queue Status
fields.tooltip: Specifies the status of the job queue entry that is processing the incoming document.

fields.name: Processed
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the incoming document has been processed.
